rulings.Case Title: ADEENA BROWN VS. CRYSTAL WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counselcivil
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 4, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF ADEENA BROWN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSOLIDATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. ALYSSA MUELLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Plaintiff Consolidated Property Management To: 1) Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Demand For Document, Set One, And Production Without Objection; 2)Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories Without Objection 3) Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer (Set One) Without Objection 4) Compel Resonses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrogatires-General Without Objection; And 5) Deem Admitted Request For Admission, Set One, And For $2,060 In Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 4, 2021 line 7. PLAINTIFF CONSOLIDATED PROPERTY MANAGEMENT Motion Of Plaintiff Consolidated Property Management To: 1) Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Demand For Document, Set One, And Production Without Objection; 2)Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories Without Objection 3) Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer (Set One) Without Objection 4) Compel Resonses To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrogatires-General Without Objection; And 5) Deem Admitted Request For Admission, Set One, And For $2,060 In Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant to provide complete verified responseswithout objections to other discovery subject to this motion within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $860 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Trial continued to January 19, 2021. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 433 UPPER DONJON, LLC VS. CAROL DIBENEDETTO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 4, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANT CAROL DIBENEDETTO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer Complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer under Ellis Act. =(501/REQ)
